title: Arbeite direkt mit deinen Dateien

style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background: #FFFFFF (pure white, no grid, no pattern, no texture)
description: A compact illustration showing three small file-type icons arranged horizontally: a blue document icon labeled '.pptx' in #118AB2, a green document icon labeled '.docx' in #06D6A0, a coral document icon labeled '.xlsx' in #EF476F. Each icon is a simplified flat file shape (rectangle with folded corner) with the extension text in 11px semibold below. Below the icons, a thin 1px divider line in #E5E7EB, then a miniature document preview: a few horizontal text lines in #D1D5DB and a small bar chart shape in #118AB2, representing an actual document being worked on. The illustration conveys: Claude arbeitet direkt mit deinen Dateien auf dem Computer.
no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, hands, faces, stock photo elements, real brand logos, terminal/command line, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, glow effects, gradient fills, dark backgrounds, English text — all visible text must be German
